block_goal: Закрыть следующий реальный delivery gap после коммита 7dfe717: расширить bounded Antarctica UI boundary от S1-only `antarcticaUi` до manifest-driven opening-tail screens (`55..60`, `61..66`, `67..70`, `i17`, `i18`, `i19`, `i19_1`, `i20`, `i21`) так, чтобы `runtime-api` продолжал владеть content loading/projection, а `apps/player-web` рендерил in-scope сцены из player-content DTO без direct repo reads и без UI-side routing heuristics.

expected_execution_time.notes: Сначала нужен additive contract freeze для `antarcticaUi`, затем bounded runtime projection и player-web render/test loop. Оркестратор должен делать более короткий polling для freeze-задачи и более длинный — для render/DOM verification loop.

architect_decision_notes: PM plan review returned `no_findings`, execution proceeded, and Architect final review found one remaining stale handoff statement. This replan adds a final micro-task so Orchestrator can dispatch the exact HANDOFF-only closeout without inventing additional work.
method_selection_rationale: Текущее состояние после `7dfe717`: truth-model/contracts уже заморожены, `runtime-api` уже владеет player-content boundary, а `apps/player-web` уже использует runtime-owned DTO. Следующий bounded gap теперь не в gameplay truth, а в UI delivery: `antarcticaUi` и manifest-driven renderer ограничены S1, тогда как opening-tail сцены уже существуют как canonical runtime/content slice. Поэтому сначала нужно явно заморозить additive multi-screen UI contract, а затем доставить видимый tail slice end-to-end как вертикальный срез, не ломая fallback для непокрытых сцен.

acceptance_model.plan_review: Required: PM должен проверить план до materialization, потому что блок меняет public player-facing UI DTO boundary и смешивает contract-first freeze с user-visible delivery slices.
acceptance_model.task_acceptance: Executor owns task-level acceptance. Freeze-задача обязана обновить `CONTRACT_INDEX.md`; каждая задача обязана выдать `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md` и task-specific correction log.
acceptance_model.block_acceptance: PM owns block acceptance после runtime/player-web verification и docs/handoff sync. Architect final acceptance требуется только если `PM_DECISION_PACKET.status = accepted` и в блоке остаётся хотя бы один delivered slice с `risk_class = R2`.

architect_instructions_for_orchestrator: Сначала отправь план на PM review; task-packets не материализуй до завершения review loop.
После plan review материализуй task-packets только из этого плана и matching `SLICE_EXPORT_SPEC.json`.
Не стартуй projection/render задачи, пока в block workspace не появился обновлённый `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` после freeze-задачи.
Для polling cadence используй `expected_execution_time` блока и `expected_duration` задач: freeze-задачу проверяй чаще, render/DOM-test loop — реже.
Если во время исполнения понадобится breaking rename `antarcticaUi`, generic UI platform abstraction или ownership shift за пределы ADR-019, остановись и эскалируй к Architect.
После завершения всех задач запроси у PM `CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md` и `PM_DECISION_PACKET.md`; если `status != accepted`, Architect final acceptance не запрашивается.
Так как блок содержит R2 freeze slice, при `PM_DECISION_PACKET.status = accepted` обязан появиться `ARCHITECT_FINAL_ACCEPTANCE.json` перед полным закрытием блока.

Following returned architect acceptance, materialize only `task-sync-contract-and-closeout-docs` as the remaining open rework task; previous implementation tasks stay closed unless Architect replans otherwise.

Following the second returned architect acceptance, materialize only `task-fix-handoff-stale-bullet` as the remaining open rework task; all other implementation and doc-sync tasks stay closed unless Architect replans otherwise.
strategic_alignment: Продвигает следующий реальный приоритет после `Complete the Antarctica Truth Model`: укрепляет canonical player-web delivery layer из Priority 2 и Priority 4 без возврата к repo-file coupling.
Сохраняет ADR-018 (gameplay truth в `game.manifest.json`), ADR-019 (runtime-api owns content loading/player-content API) и ADR-024 (bounded manifest-driven gameplay mechanics).
Убирает следующий заметный delivery gap: manifest-driven UI остаётся S1-only, хотя opening-tail runtime/content slice уже доведён до terminal `i21`.
global_rules: Использовать Context7 для актуальных Next.js / React best practices; текущее правило для этого блока — data fetching остаётся на server/page boundary, а в client component передаются уже загруженные typed props.
Сохранять additive compatibility: текущий S1 consumer не должен ломаться из-за расширения `antarcticaUi`.
Сохранять ADR-019 ownership boundary: browser и `apps/player-web` не читают `games/*` напрямую и не становятся вторым content loader.
Использовать `games/antarctica/ui/web/ui.manifest.json` только как delivery-layer UI data; gameplay truth остаётся в `games/antarctica/game.manifest.json`.
Не вводить generic SDUI engine, screen router platform, reusable component factory или новый cross-game UI abstraction layer без нового architect decision.
UI selection для info/board tail screens должна опираться на runtime snapshot (`stepIndex`, `screenId`, `activeInfoId`) и frozen mapping contract, а не на guessed client heuristics.
global_acceptance: `GET /games/antarctica/player-content` возвращает additive `antarcticaUi` surface, который покрывает S1 opening screen и bounded opening-tail screens без breaking change для текущего S1 consumer-а.

`apps/player-web` рендерит in-scope tail scenes (`55..60`, `61..66`, `67..70`, `i17`, `i18`, `i19`, `i19_1`, `i20`, `i21`) из `antarcticaUi` + session snapshot, а fallback остаётся только для внешних сцен.
Выбор между `i19` и `i19_1` зависит только от runtime state (`activeInfoId`), а не от UI-side branch logic.
`npm run verify:runtime-api`, `npm run verify:player-web` и `npm run verify:canonical` подтверждают delivered boundary.
`apps/player-web/README.md`, `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` и `NEXT_STEPS.md` не противоречат доставленному multi-screen UI boundary.
global_invariants: `services/runtime-api` остаётся sole owner загрузки `games/*` и player-facing projection.
Gameplay logic и deterministic routing не мигрируют в UI manifest или player-web.
Текущий S1 manifest-driven renderer остаётся рабочим во время и после расширения.
В блоке не появляются новые generic gameplay/UI platforms, selectors, or DSLs.
Если обнаружится реальный contract/runtime defect, его нужно эскалировать, а не маскировать UI workaround-ом.

risk_policy.R0: docs-only sync, narrow test-only update, or local non-behavioral cleanup
risk_policy.R1: bounded UI manifest projection or player-web rendering change внутри уже frozen ownership boundary и additive contract surface
risk_policy.R2: public `antarcticaUi` DTO change, reusable UI abstraction attempt, ownership change, or ADR-affecting architecture shift

method_workflow: Freeze: зафиксировать additive multi-screen `antarcticaUi` contract и current-step selection rules в `CONTRACT_INDEX.md`.
Project: расширить bounded Antarctica web UI manifest и runtime projection для opening-tail boards/info screens.
Deliver: перевести `apps/player-web` на manifest-driven current-step rendering для in-scope tail scenes, сохранив resolver/fallback только вне scope.
Accept: PM подтверждает conformance; после `status = accepted` Architect делает final acceptance, потому что блок включает R2 freeze slice.
Closeout rework: sync `CONTRACT_INDEX.md`, `NEXT_STEPS.md`, and `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` with the delivered multi-screen UI boundary before requesting renewed PM/Architect closure.
Final micro-closeout: remove the one remaining stale bullet from `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md`, then reroute through PM re-check and Architect final acceptance.

method_phases.description: Freeze additive Antarctica UI DTO and current-step selection contract.
Project bounded opening-tail S1/S2 UI screens through runtime-owned player-content.
Render opening-tail screens in player-web from antarcticaUi and sync docs/handoff.
Doc and contract synchronization after returned architect final acceptance.
Final HANDOFF-only stale-bullet cleanup after second returned architect acceptance.

method_controls: Не параллелизовать задачи: projection и render зависят от freeze-контракта.
Не выполнять player-web render задачу, пока `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` не зафиксировал additive UI contract и mapping contract.
Если `PM_DECISION_PACKET.status != accepted`, Architect final acceptance не создаётся.
Если для tail screens нужны новые global UI schema primitives или generic routing abstractions, остановиться и эскалировать вместо тихого расширения блока.
Docs sync допускается только как минимальное удаление противоречий после delivered behavior, а не как самостоятельный docs-only scope creep.
After `task-sync-contract-and-closeout-docs`, reroute the block through a quick PM conformance re-check and then request Architect final acceptance again.
Do not reopen `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` or `NEXT_STEPS.md` in the final micro-rework unless Architect explicitly replans; the remaining blocker is isolated to `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md`.
technology_rules: Предпочитать additive extension текущего `antarcticaUi` contract вместо breaking rename/removal.
Предпочитать расширение текущего Antarctica player component / renderer helpers вместо нового rendering subsystem.
Держать content fetch на page/server boundary и передавать typed content/session props в client component; не переносить data loading в browser-only layer.
Использовать существующие bounded UI component primitives там, где возможно; не расширять schema ради cosmetic variety без подтверждённой необходимости.
Сохранять root-relative asset references и canonical static asset policy.
adr_requirements: Новый ADR не требуется, пока блок остаётся bounded extension внутри ADR-018, ADR-019, ADR-024 и текущего UI-manifest delivery boundary.
Если additive multi-screen UI contract требует нового cross-game UI platform rule, reusable router abstraction или ownership shift, остановиться и эскалировать на ADR review.
Если меняется практический handoff по runtime-owned UI projection boundary, синхронизировать `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` и `NEXT_STEPS.md`.

slices.title: Freeze additive Antarctica multi-screen UI contract
slices.goal: Явно зафиксировать additive `antarcticaUi` contract и правила current-step screen selection для S1 + opening-tail screens, не ломая текущий S1 consumer.
forbidden_moves: Не делать breaking rename/remove текущего S1-поля без additive compatibility path.
Не вводить generic cross-game UI platform, renderer framework или reusable screen router.
Не переносить gameplay truth или deterministic routing в UI manifest contract.
control_points: Frozen contract сохраняет работающий S1 path и добавляет явный способ адресовать bounded tail screens.
Selection contract использует runtime snapshot fields (`stepIndex`, `screenId`, `activeInfoId`) вместо client-side guessed routing.
Contract ownership остаётся у `packages/contracts/manifest` + `runtime-api` content projection.
mandatory_tests: Runtime-api contract coverage proving additive `antarcticaUi` shape and backward-compatible S1 projection.
Negative coverage for malformed or missing screen-registry mapping when the frozen contract requires it.
acceptance_criteria: `packages/contracts/manifest` явно описывает additive multi-screen UI boundary для Antarctica.
`CONTRACT_INDEX.md` фиксирует contract ownership, compatibility story и current-step selection rules.
Runtime-api tests доказывают, что S1 projection не ломается после contract freeze.

tasks.goal: Зафиксировать additive multi-screen `antarcticaUi` DTO и mapping contract для S1 + bounded opening-tail scenes без breaking change для текущего S1 consumer-а.
inputs: Priority 2 / Priority 4 current delivery goals from `NEXT_STEPS.md`.
Current S1-only `antarcticaUi` contract and renderer usage.
Current runtime content projection behavior for `GET /games/:gameId/player-content`.
implementation_notes: Держать расширение additive: существующий S1 renderer должен остаться совместимым без forced rename/remove.
Freeze explicit mapping contract для S1 info/screens и S2 board screens вместо неявных UI heuristics.
Document the frozen UI surface and compatibility notes in `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` before later tasks continue.
tests_to_write: Runtime-api contract tests proving additive `antarcticaUi` projection and S1 backward compatibility.
Negative coverage for invalid/missing bounded screen mapping if not already covered.
deliverables: Updated `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` with UI contract ownership, compatibility, and mapping rules.
Runtime-api contract assertions aligned with the frozen UI boundary.
escalate_if: a required change would break the existing S1 consumer instead of extending it safely
the work starts to require a new generic UI platform or routing abstraction
current runtime snapshot fields are insufficient to define a deterministic mapping contract
artifact_expectations: Update `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md`, `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, and the task-specific correction log.
Update `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` before any projection/render work proceeds.

slices.title: Project opening-tail UI screens through runtime
slices.goal: Расширить bounded Antarctica web UI manifest и runtime projection так, чтобы player-content DTO содержал manifest-driven screens для opening tail (`55..60`, `61..66`, `67..70`, `i17`, `i18`, `i19`, `i19_1`, `i20`, `i21`).
forbidden_moves: Не менять gameplay logic в `games/antarctica/game.manifest.json` как часть UI projection блока.
Не расширять UI schema новым глобальным семейством primitives без architect escalation.
Не менять `apps/player-web` в этой задаче; slice owner здесь — runtime/UI manifest boundary.
control_points: UI manifest/projection покрывают только bounded tail scenes, already supported by runtime gameplay flow.
S1 entry screen and asset policy остаются валидными после projection expansion.
DTO отсутствует безопасно вне scope: projection не притворяется полной заменой fallback path для всех сцен.
mandatory_tests: Runtime-api endpoint tests proving `GET /games/antarctica/player-content` returns tail UI screens and preserves existing S1 data.
Negative coverage for malformed bounded tail screen data if current validator/projection path needs it.
acceptance_criteria: Player-content DTO содержит bounded tail UI screens for the in-scope opening-tail scenes.
Runtime projection остаётся additive и сохраняет S1 entry behavior.

tasks.goal: Добавить bounded opening-tail screen definitions в Antarctica web UI manifest и спроецировать их через runtime-owned player-content API.
inputs: GSR-027 / GSR-028 / GSR-029 as the factual tail-slice behavior reference.
Current Antarctica web UI manifest and runtime content projection.
implementation_notes: Model only the bounded tail scenes already supported by runtime gameplay state; do not widen into post-opening extraction.
Prefer composition with existing component primitives before any schema growth.
Keep projection additive and tolerant of partial coverage outside the in-scope scenes.
tests_to_write: Runtime-api integration tests for player-content tail UI projection.
If needed, narrow validator/projection coverage for malformed bounded tail screen definitions.
deliverables: Updated `games/antarctica/ui/web/ui.manifest.json` with bounded tail screen definitions.
Runtime-owned player-content projection for the in-scope tail screens.
Handoff sync describing the new practical UI projection boundary.
escalate_if: a required tail screen cannot be represented with the frozen bounded UI contract
projection starts to require gameplay inference that belongs to runtime/game manifest instead of delivery data
a screen needs a new global UI primitive family rather than bounded composition
artifact_expectations: Update `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md`, `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, and the task-specific correction log.
Reference the exact bounded scenes covered by projection so PM can verify scope.

slices.title: Render opening-tail screens in player-web
slices.goal: Перевести `apps/player-web` на manifest-driven current-step rendering для in-scope opening-tail scenes, сохранив resolver/fallback path только для сцен вне scope.
forbidden_moves: Не добавлять direct `games/*` reads или browser-side content loading.
Не придумывать UI-side branch logic для `i19` vs `i19_1`; использовать только runtime state.
Не вводить новый generic rendering subsystem или platform-wide router.
control_points: In-scope tail scenes выбираются по frozen mapping contract и runtime snapshot, а не по implicit component assumptions.
Current S1 manifest-driven path остаётся рабочим после generalization.
Fallback action catalog/resolver остаётся только для сцен вне frozen multi-screen UI scope.
mandatory_tests: Player-web DOM/integration coverage for at least one S2 tail board, one variant info path (`i19`/`i19_1`), terminal `i21`, and one outside-scope fallback scene.
Regression coverage proving existing S1 manifest-driven rendering still works.
acceptance_criteria: `apps/player-web` рендерит in-scope tail scenes from `antarcticaUi` instead of relying on the legacy resolver/fallback path.
Variant and terminal scenes follow runtime snapshot fields exactly.
Docs describe the delivered multi-screen UI boundary without contradicting the code.

tasks.goal: Обновить `apps/player-web`, чтобы tail scenes рендерились из `antarcticaUi` + session snapshot, и синхронизировать docs с delivered boundary.
inputs: Runtime-projected tail UI screens from player-content DTO.
Current Antarctica player component, helpers, and tail test fixtures.
implementation_notes: Сохранять data loading на page/server boundary и передавать loaded typed props в client component; не переносить fetch logic в browser path.
Generalize existing Antarctica renderer incrementally: preserve S1 behavior while adding in-scope tail screen selection.
Docs sync делать только там, где текущие документы начинают противоречить delivered multi-screen UI boundary.
tests_to_write: Player-web DOM/integration tests for tail S2 board rendering, variant info routing, terminal i21, and outside-scope fallback preservation.
Regression test for existing S1 manifest-driven rendering if current suite does not already lock it well enough.
deliverables: Updated player-web tests/fixtures covering in-scope tail scenes and fallback preservation.
Synced `apps/player-web/README.md`, `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md`, and `NEXT_STEPS.md` for the delivered boundary.
escalate_if: player-web needs a new generic rendering engine instead of bounded renderer extension
runtime snapshot fields are not sufficient to select the correct in-scope tail screen deterministically
verify:player-web fails due to an unrelated existing issue outside the slice boundary
artifact_expectations: Update `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md`, `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, and the task-specific correction log.
Call out any doc deltas explicitly so PM can verify the repo no longer contradicts the delivered UI boundary.

slices.title: Sync contract and closeout docs
slices.goal: Снять blockers из `ARCHITECT_FINAL_ACCEPTANCE.json`: синхронизировать contract narrative и project docs с фактически доставленной multi-screen UI boundary.
forbidden_moves: Не менять project code или runtime/player-web behavior в этом rework slice.
Не переопределять delivered contract shape; синхронизировать только narrative и pointers с уже доставленной реализацией.
Не расширять scope за пределы `CONTRACT_INDEX.md`, `NEXT_STEPS.md` и `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md`.
control_points: `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` must describe the actual selection contract: S2 boards resolve via `stepIndex -> boardKey`, S1 info variants via `activeInfoId`, and `entryPoint` is only the initial-load fallback.
`services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` and `NEXT_STEPS.md` must no longer describe the multi-screen UI boundary as a future gap.
The rework must stay doc-only and must not reopen implementation scope.
mandatory_tests: No new automated tests; verify by direct artifact-to-code consistency against `apps/player-web/src/components/antarctica-player.tsx` and current delivered docs.
acceptance_criteria: `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` matches the delivered `screenKey` selection logic exactly.
`services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` and `NEXT_STEPS.md` describe the multi-screen `antarcticaUi` boundary as delivered state instead of future work.
Architect final review blockers from `ARCHITECT_FINAL_ACCEPTANCE.json` are fully addressed without code changes.

tasks.goal: Синхронизировать `CONTRACT_INDEX.md`, `NEXT_STEPS.md` и `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` с фактически доставленной multi-screen UI boundary и снять blockers из architect final review.
inputs: Returned architect final acceptance with explicit blockers.
Current PM acceptance summary and executor reports for this block.
implementation_notes: Keep the rework strictly documentation-only; do not touch runtime/player-web code or tests.
Update `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` so its mapping rules explicitly match the delivered renderer behavior instead of the earlier simplified pseudocode.
Update `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` and `NEXT_STEPS.md` only enough to remove stale descriptions of the multi-screen UI boundary.
deliverables: Synchronized `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` describing the actual `screenKey` resolution contract.
Updated `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` and `NEXT_STEPS.md` with no stale multi-screen UI gap language.
Fresh executor artifacts proving the architect final-review blockers are cleared.
escalate_if: removing the documented contradictions would require changing runtime/player-web code instead of docs
the delivered implementation and PM packet disagree on the actual screen-selection contract in a way that cannot be resolved by doc sync alone
additional stale planning docs are discovered that imply a wider replan instead of this bounded closeout task
artifact_expectations: Update `EXECUTOR_REPORT.md`, `TASK_ACCEPTANCE.md`, and the task-specific correction log for this rework task.
Call out exactly which stale statements were corrected so PM can re-check conformance quickly.

slices.title: Fix HANDOFF stale bullet
slices.goal: Удалить последний architect-final-acceptance blocker: stale bullet в `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md`, который всё ещё описывает UI boundary как будто slice заканчивается на `i16`.
forbidden_moves: Не менять project code, tests, `CONTRACT_INDEX.md` или `NEXT_STEPS.md` в этом микро-task.
Не расширять scope beyond one stale bullet in `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md`.
Не переопределять delivered implementation or contract behavior; исправить только stale handoff narrative.
control_points: The stale bullet under `Что ещё НЕ сделано` must no longer claim that the current player-facing slice effectively stops at `i16`.
`services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` must present one internally consistent current-state story after the edit.
The micro-rework must stay docs-only and isolated to the handoff plus required workflow artifacts.
mandatory_tests: No automated tests; verify by direct reading that the contradictory `i16`-only statement is removed or rewritten consistently with the delivered multi-screen boundary.
acceptance_criteria: `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` no longer contains the stale bullet that frames post-`i16` UI delivery as the next gap.
The remaining handoff text is consistent with the delivered multi-screen `antarcticaUi` boundary and the current PM packet.
No code or non-handoff docs are changed in this micro-task.

tasks.goal: Исправить последний stale bullet в `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` и обновить workflow artifacts, чтобы architect final acceptance больше не блокировался handoff contradiction.
inputs: Returned architect final acceptance naming the exact remaining blocker.
Current PM re-check packet confirming all other blockers are closed.
implementation_notes: Keep the edit minimal: remove or rewrite only the stale bullet in `Что ещё НЕ сделано` so it matches the already-correct later multi-screen section.
Do not modify any project code, tests, or unrelated planning documents in this micro-task.
Update the block-level executor artifacts so PM and Architect can verify that the final blocker is now closed.
deliverables: A consistent `services/runtime-api/HANDOFF.md` with the stale `i16`-only bullet removed or corrected.
escalate_if: fixing the stale handoff statement would require changing code or broader docs beyond this micro-task scope
another contradictory handoff statement is discovered that implies a larger replan instead of a one-bullet fix
PM packet and handoff cannot be reconciled with a minimal docs-only edit
artifact_expectations: Explicitly quote or describe the removed stale statement so PM can re-check conformance quickly.
